title: Dirty Plugin Symlink Dev
objective: A disposable user state with an installed plugin path symlinked to an in-env development directory, proving update and doctor flows do not replace or destructively follow plugin symlinks.

setup.title: Write Dirty Plugin Symlink Dev
setup.intent: Install a safe in-env symlinked plugin development directory with checksum evidence.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs prepare dirty-plugin-symlink-dev

setup.title: Verify Dirty Plugin Symlink Dev
setup.intent: Verify OpenClaw handling preserved the symlink and target files.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs verify dirty-plugin-symlink-dev

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes symlink and in-env target files

source.note: plugin install path symlinked to an in-env development directory
